name: Select Harvests Limited
analysis: SHV has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.9100, stop A$3.5442, target A$5.0700 (3.17:1) — then trail it.
